hero.title: understand, track and shrink your carbon footprint.
hero.lede: India-specific data, a smart context-aware assistant, and one simple action at a time. Log what you do today and Carbonara shows you exactly where to cut.
footer.sources: Emission factors are awareness-grade approximations from the CEA CO₂ Baseline Database, the India GHG Program and Our World in Data; live factors via Carbon Interface when configured.
footer.challenge: Built for Challenge 3 — Carbon Footprint Awareness Platform.
form.heading: Log an activity
form.qtyError: Enter an amount greater than zero.
dash.heading: Today's footprint
dash.noBreakdown: No activities logged yet. Add one to see your breakdown.
insights.heading: Your personalized plan
insights.lede: Get smart, context-aware actions based on what you've actually logged.
insights.attribRules: Narrative generated by the rules engine.
whatif.heading: What if you switched?
whatif.lede: Try a swap and see what it would save over a year — based on your own logs where possible.
whatif.basisHistory: based on your last 4 weeks of logs.
whatif.basisAssumed: based on typical usage (log this activity for a personal estimate).
whatif.pick: Pick a swap to see its impact.
whatifSwap.car_to_metro.label: Drive less, metro more
whatifSwap.car_to_metro.description: Shift your petrol-car kilometres to the metro.
whatifSwap.two_wheeler_to_ev.label: Petrol scooter → electric
whatifSwap.two_wheeler_to_ev.description: Ride the same kilometres on an electric two-wheeler.
whatifSwap.ride_hailing_to_metro.label: Cabs → metro
whatifSwap.ride_hailing_to_metro.descrip: Replace Ola/Uber rides with the metro where it runs.
whatifSwap.mutton_to_veg.label: Mutton meals → veg thali
whatifSwap.mutton_to_veg.description: Swap red-meat meals for a vegetarian thali.
whatifSwap.chicken_to_veg.label: Chicken meals → veg thali
whatifSwap.chicken_to_veg.description: Make a few chicken meals plant-based instead.
whatifSwap.ac_setpoint.label: AC at 26 °C, not 22 °C
whatifSwap.ac_setpoint.description: Raise the AC setpoint — every degree cuts cooling energy ~6%.
challenges.heading: Weekly challenges
challenges.lede: Pledge a challenge and Carbonara tracks it from what you log this week (honor system — it's based on your own logging).
challenges.total: kg CO₂e avoided through completed challenges
challenges.pledgeOk: Pledged "{title}" — it's on for this week!
challenge.metro_monday.title: Metro Monday
challenge.metro_monday.description: Take the metro for at least 5 km on Monday instead of driving.
challenge.meatless_week.title: Meatless week
challenge.meatless_week.description: A whole week of veg meals — log at least 3 and no meat meals.
challenge.ev_week.title: Electric miles week
challenge.ev_week.description: Ride 30 km on an electric two-wheeler instead of petrol this week.
challenge.no_delivery_week.title: No-delivery week
challenge.no_delivery_week.description: Skip food delivery and parcels for a week (log at least 3 activities).
challenge.ac_26_week.title: AC at 26 °C week
challenge.ac_26_week.description: Cut your logged electricity 10% below your 4-week average.
routines.heading: My routines
routines.lede: Save your usual day once — commute, meals, power — then log it in one tap.
routines.name: Routine name
routines.invalid: Give the routine a name and at least one activity.
trend.heading: Last 30 days
trend.tableCaption: Daily emissions for the last 30 days
trend.aria: 30-day emissions trend: currently averaging {avg} kg per day, {trend} over the last week. Daily target is {target} kg.
onb.welcomeLede: Your India-focused carbon coach. Understand your footprint and shrink it — one simple action at a time.
onb.nameLede: Just for friendly messages — feel free to skip.
onb.commuteTitle: How do you usually get around?
onb.commuteLede: We'll tune your travel tips to match.
onb.dietTitle: What's on your plate most days?
onb.dietLede: Food is a big slice of any footprint.
onb.stateLede: Electricity is priced with your regional grid — coal-heavy in the East, hydro-rich in the North East.
profile.heading: Your profile
profile.name: Name
profile.stateNote: Used to price electricity with your regional grid instead of the national average.
rec.transport.0.title: Swap short car trips for metro or bus
rec.transport.0.detail: City transit emits a fraction of a private car per km. Moving a 10 km daily commute from a petrol car to the metro saves ~1.4 kg CO2e a day.
rec.transport.1.title: Reconsider that domestic flight
rec.transport.1.detail: For trips under ~1000 km, an AC train journey can cut emissions by over 90% versus flying.
rec.transport.2.title: Carpool or share an auto
rec.transport.2.detail: Splitting a ride halves the per-person footprint of the same distance.
rec.energy.0.title: Set the AC to 24–26 °C
rec.energy.0.detail: On India's coal-heavy grid every saved unit avoids ~0.71 kg CO2e. Each degree higher can cut cooling energy by 3–5%.
rec.energy.1.title: Switch to LED and star-rated appliances
rec.energy.1.detail: BEE 5-star appliances and LEDs noticeably reduce monthly electricity use.
rec.energy.2.title: Consider rooftop solar
rec.energy.2.detail: Solar offsets grid electricity directly — the highest-leverage home upgrade in India.
rec.diet.0.title: Make a few meals plant-forward
rec.diet.0.detail: A vegetarian thali (~0.6 kg) emits far less than a mutton meal (~3.5 kg). Swapping one red-meat meal saves ~2.9 kg CO2e.
rec.diet.1.title: Cut food waste
rec.diet.1.detail: Plan portions and store leftovers — wasted food wastes all the emissions that produced it.
rec.waste.0.title: Segregate and compost wet waste
rec.waste.0.detail: Composting kitchen waste avoids methane from landfills and cuts your waste footprint substantially.
rec.waste.1.title: Refuse single-use plastic
rec.waste.1.detail: Carry a reusable bag and bottle to avoid recurring disposable waste.
rec.goods.0.title: Buy less, choose durable
rec.goods.0.detail: A new garment carries ~15 kg CO2e. Repairing and buying second-hand avoids most of it.
rec.general.0.title: Start logging your daily activities
rec.general.0.detail: Track your travel, electricity, meals and waste for a few days. Once there's data, you'll get targeted, personalized actions.
chat.noData: I can't see any logged activities yet. Add a few of today's actions — travel, electricity, meals — and I'll tell you where your footprint is concentrated and how to cut it.
chat.biggest: Your biggest contributor today is {top} at {kg} kg CO2e ({pct}% of your total). Tackling that first gives you the most impact.
chat.total: You've logged {kg} kg CO2e today — that's {standing}. The India average is {india} kg/day and the global average is {global} kg/day.
chat.fallback: Right now {top} is your biggest source at {kg} kg CO2e today. Ask me "what's my biggest source?", "how do I reduce it?", or "how am I doing vs the target?".
msg.empty: Log a few of today's activities — travel, electricity, meals — and I'll suggest the highest-impact ways to cut your footprint.
msg.standingWithin: That's within the {target} kg/day sustainable target — great going.
msg.standingOver: That's about {ratio}x the {target} kg/day sustainable target.
msg.main: Today you've logged {kg} kg CO2e, and {top} is your biggest contributor. {standing} Focus there first — the actions below are ordered by impact.
